title: WmxSitemap
description: Information about a sitemap submitted to Search Console. Includes processing status, error counts, and content details.

lastSubmitted.description: Date and time when the sitemap was last submitted to Search Console.

isPending.description: Whether the sitemap is still being processed.

isSitemapsIndex.description: Whether this is a sitemap index file.

type.description: The type of content in the sitemap.

lastDownloaded.description: Date and time when the sitemap was last downloaded by Google.

warnings.description: Number of warnings for the sitemap.

errors.description: Number of errors for the sitemap.

contents.description: Content details for this sitemap, broken down by content type.
